NAVAREA XIX 74/24
 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT DAILY OPERATIONS ANDOYA SPACE 
  
 PERIODE 02 - 06 JULY 2024 0600 - 1300 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING TWO DANGER AREAS: 
  
 AMBER INNER
 A. 69-24.26N 015-51.76E
 B. 69-18.29N 016-04.02E
 C. 69-16.70N 015-58.12E
 D. 69-22.56N 015-43.56E

 AMBER OUTER
 A. 70-35.25N 013-59.20E
 B. 70-19.57N 012-37.07E
 C. 69-55.24N 013-18.98E
 D. 70-12.00N 014-45.30E
